strengths: Implemented data quality with Great Expectations
weaknesses: Resume years of data engineering < required 4+
improvement_bullets: Architected and maintained high-scale, production-grade data pipelines using Python and Airflow, implementing automated alerting systems to proactively monitor data quality and reduce downtime.
Designed and implemented core data models and star schemas in BigQuery and Snowflake to facilitate client-facing reporting datasets and improve query performance for non-technical stakeholders.
Applied a startup-focused, high-ownership mindset to bridge the gap between engineering and operations, directly managing the full lifecycle of data infrastructure to ensure product-wide reliability.
Spearheaded the design of scalable data infrastructure, transforming raw API and relational database sources into structured models to support high-volume, real-time operational workflows.
Demonstrated technical versatility by leveraging foundational knowledge in Python and SQL to integrate diverse data services, effectively debugging complex system issues at the source.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Engineer opportunity with Axiōma Search. I am interested in this opportunity because of your commitment to building high-leverage AI agents that automate complex operational workflows, a space where I am eager to apply my technical background. What interests me about working for Axiōma Search is your focus on scaling stable data infrastructure to support rapid product growth; this challenge uniquely excites me because I thrive in high-ownership, fast-paced environments. I believe my expertise in architecting end-to-end data pipelines and my ability to build clean, high-performance data models would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a startup-minded, hands-on methodology. In fact, while building the FRED Economic Batch Pipeline, I recognized that raw API data was a bottleneck for analysts. I implemented a robust ELT pipeline using Python, Airflow, and dbt to structure the data into a production-grade star schema, while simultaneously integrating Great Expectations for automated data quality validation. This work resulted in a significant reduction in query time and provided a reliable foundation for stakeholder dashboards. Ultimately, I know that the Data Engineer role at Axiōma Search would allow me to bring my experience in pipeline optimization to your core data infrastructure. Additionally, my role as an Analytics & Operations Lead at Shine Masters Cleaning Services enabled me to develop my operational-alignment skills. I identified inefficiencies in our reporting, which led me to automate key workflows that reduced manual tasks by 30% and improved operational efficiency by 40%. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my Python and SQL expertise in working on high-volume data pipelines at Axiōma Search. I know that my proficiency in building reliable infrastructure and my commitment to high-quality data modeling align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Engineer role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
